name: Pine Marten
llmPolicy: Rule-based local placeholder only; future LLM drafts must use provided facts and open review artifacts, never publish directly.
providedFacts: The European pine marten, also known as the pine marten, is a mustelid native to and widespread in most of Europe, Asia Minor, the Caucasus, and parts of Iran, Iraq, and Syria.
It is listed as Least Concern on the IUCN Red List.
It is less commonly known as baum marten or sweet marten.
captionOptions: Pine Marten has a cute trick to notice.
Look closely: Pine Marten is built for forest life.

Pine Marten keeps one clever secret: The European pine marten, also known as the pine marten, is a mustelid native to and widespread in most of Europe, Asia Minor, the Caucasus, and parts of Iran, Iraq, and Syria.
